frequency_range: 1 Hz (infrasound) to 20,000+ Hz (spray); four distinct acoustic layers

theory_nodes.concept: FIRST NON-BIOLOGICAL SPS MAXIMUM. Every previous SPS E=9 entry (Marten 308, GHO pair 309, Orca 311) is a biological acoustic event. Degree 312 is the first E=9 from a non-biological source: the physical world reaching the SPS maximum through meteorological and oceanographic processes.
theory_nodes.description: First meteorological/physical SPS E=9 entry -- the physical world reaches maximum alongside the biological world.

theory_nodes.concept: INFRASOUND as the E=9 factor. Wave impact against rocky headlands generates infrasonic energy (1-100 Hz) that is felt as physical vibration before it is heard. The felt-before-heard quality elevates the calibration from E=7-8 (audible impact alone) to E=9. The body registers the event before the ears do.
theory_nodes.description: Infrasound generation by wave impact as the specific physical factor producing E=9.

theory_nodes.concept: Four acoustic layers: (1) infrasound 1-100 Hz (impact vibration, felt), (2) impact noise 100 Hz-2 kHz (primary audible event, 100-110 dB), (3) spray white noise 2-20 kHz (sustained between-wave layer), (4) wind drone 50-500 Hz (bass foundation, shoreline conifers). Combination calibrates E=9; no single layer alone reaches E=9.
theory_nodes.description: Four-layer acoustic complex and the combination-as-maximum principle.

theory_nodes.concept: BEAUTIFUL OMINOUS WEIGHT shared with Soundgarden. Black Hole Sun: major-key melody over harmonically unsettled progressions, warm Cornell voice over existential lyrics, cheerful video imagery distorted. Winter storm surge: beautiful visual spectacle (waves, spray, grey light) over physical dread (infrasonic vibration, scale, power). Both operate through beauty-over-dread.
theory_nodes.description: Beautiful ominous weight as the shared aesthetic principle of Soundgarden and the storm surge.

theory_nodes.concept: E=18 SUSTAINED SECOND DEGREE. Degrees 311 (Nirvana + Orca, E=18) and 312 (Soundgarden + Storm, E=18) are the engine's only consecutive E=18 degrees. The Summit Maximum is sustained across both. The engine's highest combined energy zone spans exactly these two degrees.
theory_nodes.description: E=18 sustained across two consecutive degrees: 311 and 312 form the engine's maximum zone.

cross_references.relationship: Preceding degree at E=9. Biological marine (311) to meteorological/physical (312). E=18 sustained across both. The engine's maximum zone is defined by these two consecutive degrees.

First SPS E=9. The cluster spans 308-312: Marten (308), GHO pair (309), skip 310 (E=8), Orca (311), Storm (312). Four E=9 entries across five degrees. The SPS maximum zone spans the Grunge Summit entirely.
Storm as context (310, E=8) to storm as subject (312, E=9). Dawn chorus through the storm at E=8; the storm itself at E=9.

s36_pair.pairing_note: E=9 + E=9 = E=18. Second consecutive Summit Maximum. Beautiful ominous weight: Soundgarden's Black Hole Sun (beauty-over-dread harmonic aesthetic) paired with Puget Sound winter storm surge (beautiful-visual-spectacle over physical-dread infrasonic impact). Kim Thayil's alternate-tuning harmonic geometry and the Salish Sea's bathymetric geometry share the same principle: unconventional geometry produces the signature ominous-beautiful quality.
